case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. MICHIKO FISCHER-KAMEDA et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) KAMEDA. THE AUG-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
